summary: Crystal‑clear recording of a stellar 1990 Dead show, widely praised as one of the year’s best performances.
review: The reviewer hails this concert as a top‑5 outing for 1990 and praises every aspect of the performance. Equally impressive is the audio – described as crisp, clean and the most sonically pleasing source of the night, thanks to superb capture and mastering. Both the music and the tape quality earn high marks.

ai_rating.rationale: A single detailed 5‑star review rates both the show and recording as outstanding, leading to a very high combined rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review highlights crystal‑clear, crisp sound with no noted flaws; mastering praised as artful and scientific.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer indicates the entire show is stellar, placing it among the top performances of 1990 without calling out specific set‑list issues.
